remarks: Discover a rare opportunity to build your dream estate on more than 4 beautiful, level acres in backcountry Greenwich. Surrounded by multi-million-dollar homes, this exceptional property offers both privacy and convenience, located near Audubon with easy access to the Merritt Parkway, Glenville, and Armonk. Adding to its appeal, the previous structure has been removed, along with the underground oil and water tanks, providing a clean slate for development. A truly rare offering in a premier location--bring your architect and imagine the possibilities.
